_meta.purpose: lesson_01 v2.10 新規追加語彙の画像生成プロンプト。master_image_registry.json v1.5 の pending エントリに対応。対象: vocab_大学生・国籍7語・vocab_病院・named_character_card×5（計14件）。GASの JSON_FILE_ID にこのファイルのDriveファイルIDを設定して使用する。

gasSettings._note: GAS の SETTINGS に以下を設定する。master_image_registry.json は GAS が直接読まないため JSON_FILE_ID には指定不要。
gasSettings.JSON_FILE_ID: このファイルをDriveにアップロードしたときのファイルID
gasSettings.IMAGE_FOLDER_ID: 生成画像の保存先DriveフォルダID（既存フォルダを流用可）
gasSettings.SS_SHEET_NAME: 第1課_新語彙_画像生成ログ

keep_entries: ex_L01_010・014（既存生成済み・registry更新のみ）

character_assets.word: 鈴木さん（先生・日本人）
character_assets.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a character portrait card for Japanese language learning materials. This recurring character is a Japanese male language teacher, late 40s to early 50s.

[SUBJECT]
A Japanese male in his late 40s–50s. Salt-and-pepper or graying short hair, neatly combed. Wearing a conservative navy or charcoal business suit with a white dress shirt and a simple muted tie. Calm, authoritative but approachable expression. East Asian (Japanese) features.
Key identifying item: He may hold a textbook or a whiteboard marker in one hand.
The character's role must be immediately recognizable from clothing, posture, and props alone. No readable name text anywhere on the card.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character stands naturally and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — the camera is positioned at the subject's eye height (not above, not below) and rotated approximately 30-45 degrees to one side. Diagonal front view showing both the front face and a partial side view simultaneously. DO NOT use an overhead angle. Keep both feet visible on a flat ground plane.
Soft cream white background. No other characters or objects.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight. Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background (similar to #FBFBFB, hex value FBFBFB), deep slate navy outlines (similar to #1B2C40, hex value 1B2C40), muted warm blue (similar to #4A7FB5, hex value 4A7FB5) and warm amber gold (similar to #FAD141, hex value FAD141) as accents. This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no labels, no name badges with readable text. No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures. Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

character_assets.word: リンさん（学生・中国人）
character_assets.prompt:

Create a character portrait card for Japanese language learning materials. This recurring character is a young Chinese female university student, early 20s.

[SUBJECT]
A young East Asian (Chinese) woman in her early 20s. Long straight dark hair, mid-length or longer. Casual smart clothing — simple top (muted warm blue or white) with jeans or slacks. Bright, open, friendly expression. Backpack on one shoulder or a notebook under her arm.
Key identifying item: A small Chinese flag badge (five yellow stars on red) pinned to her bag strap or collar as the subtle nationality cue.
The character's role must be immediately recognizable from clothing, posture, and props alone. No readable name text anywhere on the card.

Full-body shot. The character stands naturally and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — the camera is positioned at the subject's eye height (not above, not below) and rotated approximately 30-45 degrees to one side. Diagonal front view showing both the front face and a partial side view simultaneously. DO NOT use an overhead angle. Keep both feet visible on a flat ground plane.
Soft cream white background. No other characters or objects.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight. Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background (similar to #FBFBFB, hex value FBFBFB), deep slate navy outlines (similar to #1B2C40, hex value 1B2C40), muted warm blue (similar to #4A7FB5, hex value 4A7FB5) and warm amber gold (similar to #FAD141, hex value FAD141) as accents. This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no labels, no name badges with readable text. No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures. Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

vocabulary_images.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials. The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "大学生 (university student)" at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A young adult (male or female) in their late teens to early 20s, dressed in casual smart clothes typical of a university student: a simple top (muted warm blue or neutral tone) with jeans or slacks. Carrying a backpack AND visibly holding a university-style textbook or lecture notes. The combination of backpack + textbook signals 'university student' rather than a younger school pupil.
Pose and expression: Relaxed, open, slightly eager expression. Standing naturally with good posture.
The character's role or nationality must be immediately obvious from clothing, props, and any badge alone.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — the camera is positioned at the subject's eye height (not above, not below) and rotated approximately 30-45 degrees to one side. Diagonal front view showing both the front face and a partial side view simultaneously. DO NOT use an overhead angle. Keep both feet visible on a flat ground plane.
Solid cream white background. No other characters or objects.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]

This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials. The building must be IMMEDIATELY and UNAMBIGUOUSLY recognizable as a hospital (病院) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A medium to large hospital building with a calm, clean white exterior. A large red cross symbol is prominently displayed on the building facade or signboard above the entrance. The building has a main entrance with an automatic sliding glass door.
A single short Japanese signage word 「病院」 is mounted clearly near the entrance.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent. Straight vertical lines, natural perspective, no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue or soft cream sky background.

Functional cues — 3 anchors required:
- Entrance cue: A covered entrance canopy with a wheelchair ramp beside the main sliding door.
- User action cue: A medical staff member in a white coat near the entrance; one patient with a family member nearby.
- Surrounding anchor: An ambulance bay or emergency vehicle parking space visible at the side of the building.

The building fills 70% of the frame. Negative space in the top third for typography.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight. Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: pale sky-blue background, deep slate navy outlines (similar to #1B2C40, hex value 1B2C40), muted warm colors for building facade, warm amber gold (similar to #FAD141, hex value FAD141) for accent details. This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art.

[CONSTRAINTS]
EXCEPTION: Single short Japanese signage 「病院」 is permitted — ONE word only, small, mounted on entrance. No other text, letters, or symbols anywhere. No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects. Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows.

example_images.sentence: 鈴木さんは日本人です。
example_images._note: vocab_person. 日本人=鈴木さん。char_鈴木を流用（日本国旗バッジが視覚的フラグ）。

example_images.sentence: リンさんは中国人です。
example_images._note: vocab_person. 中国人=リンさん。char_リンを流用（中国国旗バッジが視覚的フラグ）。

example_images.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create an example sentence illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must clearly convey the meaning of: 「リンさんですか。」 (Is that Lin-san?)

[SUBJECT]
Character A (questioner): a generic adult teacher figure (gender-neutral, professional attire). Character B: a young East Asian (Chinese) female student in her 20s, long straight dark hair, casual smart clothes, backpack. Character B holds a name card or a character card showing their own portrait.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Character A faces Character B with a questioning gesture — slightly raised hand or tilted head. Character B is the visual focus. A thought bubble or large question mark symbol (amber gold) floats above Character A to represent the question 'Is this リンさん?'. Simple classroom or corridor background.
The scene must make the sentence meaning visually obvious WITHOUT any text.
Wide 16:9 shot. Characters separated horizontally, questioner on the left, subject on the right. Eye-level, 50mm.
Simple minimal background with only essential context elements.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight. Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background (similar to #FBFBFB, hex value FBFBFB), deep slate navy outlines (similar to #1B2C40, hex value 1B2C40), muted warm blue (similar to #4A7FB5, hex value 4A7FB5) and warm amber gold (similar to #FAD141, hex value FAD141) as accents. This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image. No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures. Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

example_images.sentence: はい、リンさんです。／いいえ、リンさんじゃありません。
example_images.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create an example sentence illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must clearly convey the meaning of: 「はい、リンさんです。／いいえ、リンさんじゃありません。」 (Yes, it's Lin-san. / No, it's not Lin-san.)

[SUBJECT]
Two-panel or split scene. Left panel (YES): a young East Asian (Chinese) female student in her 20s, long straight dark hair, casual smart clothes, backpack, smiling and pointing to herself with a check mark (✓) symbol above. Right panel (NO): a different young woman (different hairstyle, different clothes) shaking her head with a cross (✗) symbol above.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Split composition: YES scenario (left) and NO scenario (right) separated by a thin vertical divider. Both panels show the character's response gesture. YES panel: warm amber gold check mark (✓) above. NO panel: muted red or slate cross (✗) above. Simple neutral background.
The scene must make the sentence meaning visually obvious WITHOUT any text.
Wide 16:9 shot. Horizontal split 50/50. Symbols are large enough to be immediately readable. 50mm lens.
Simple minimal background with only essential context elements.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight. Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background (similar to #FBFBFB, hex value FBFBFB), deep slate navy outlines (similar to #1B2C40, hex value 1B2C40), muted warm blue (similar to #4A7FB5, hex value 4A7FB5) and warm amber gold (similar to #FAD141, hex value FAD141) as accents. This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols inside the image. No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures. Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
